ConnectionStrings._comment: Provided at runtime via the ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection environment variable. Never commit a real database password here. Local development uses appsettings.Development.json (the docker-compose Postgres).

Clients._comment: Shared secret every kiosk client must present to connect to the SignalR hub and the client-facing API endpoints. Supplied in production via the Clients__SharedSecret environment variable; leave blank locally to allow anonymous clients. Distribute the same value to each client as LANYARD_CLIENT_SHARED_SECRET.

VideoStreaming._comment: ICE servers for cross-client video streaming. Empty = STUN fallback in the browser. To relay through a TURN server (needed when direct peer-to-peer is blocked), add e.g. { "Urls": ["turn:<server-ip>:3478"], "Username": "user", "Credential": "pass" }.
